hooks.command: node -e "const p=process.env.FILE_PATH; if(p&&/\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|css|scss)$/.test(p)) console.log('[Hint] Consider /simplify to clean up, /verification-before-completion to validate.')"

node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='task_plan.md';if(fs.existsSync(p)){const c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');const done=(c.match(/\[x\]/gi)||[]).length;const total=(c.match(/\[ \]/gi)||[]).length+done;console.log('[Session End] task_plan.md: '+done+'/'+total+' tasks done');if(done<total)console.log('[Session End] '+ (total-done) +' tasks remaining for next session.')}"
